TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Don Bielke nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Don Bielke i 1954 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 8 ku uwac atu silsil 67, namapili' tu nu Fort Wayne Pistons putiput. bulad demiad, 1932 a mihca, Don Bielke, miunduay.
S.PHON: don biər~ɾkə nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. don biər~ɾkə i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu fort wajnə pistons putiput. bur~ɾad dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, don biər~ɾkə, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Don Bielke nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Don Bielke i 1954 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 8 ku uwac atu silsil 67, namapili' tu nu Fort Wayne Pistons putiput. bulad demiad, 1932 a mihca, Don Bielke, miunduay.
S.PHON: don biər~ɾkə nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. don biər~ɾkə i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu fort wajnə pistons putiput. bur~ɾad dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, don biər~ɾkə, miunduaj.
